accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all content grounded in the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as establishing a new appraisal policy for Interior Department transactions.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the Act supersedes prior federal or state laws requiring local state licensure for covered transactions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately describes the three conditions for using out-of-state appraisers.

effective_dates.why: Notes 90-day deadline for public availability and annual reporting starting one year after enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers licensing provision, preference for in-state appraisers, conditions for out-of-state appraisers, public availability, and annual reports.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Secretary of the Interior.

correct_figures.why: 90-day deadline and reporting timeline correctly stated.
